plugin.name: MushReader
plugin.author: Ryan Bishop
plugin.purpose: Plugin for multiple screen readers. Rewritten from plugin built by Tyler Spivey

muclient.script:
require "serialize"
-- ============================================================================ -- CHANGELOG -- ============================================================================ -- Original plugin by Tyler Spivey used: -- - tts_enabled + etts + ftts state interplay -- - leading spaces in say() -- - Execute("tts_note ...") inside tnote() -- - direct blank-line regex checks -- - OnPluginScreendraw with immediate nvda.say() -- -- Rewrite changes before this revision: -- 1. Replaced old state flow with: -- speech_master_enabled -- speech_silent_override -- speech_window_has_focus -- speech_runtime_enabled -- 2. Removed leading spaces from say(). -- 3. Kept OnPluginScreendraw immediate for reliable speech. -- 4. Removed line deduplication so repeated identical lines still speak. -- 5. Kept interrupt speech separate via interrupt_say(). -- -- Changes in this revision: -- 6. Changed tnote() to call note_say() directly instead of Execute("tts_note ..."). -- 7. Added normalize_for_speech() to trim leading/trailing whitespace. -- 8. Updated speak_output_line() to: -- - use cheaper blank/nonblank checks -- - normalize spoken text before say() -- - avoid speaking whitespace-only substitutions
-- ============================================================================ -- STATE -- ============================================================================
speech_master_enabled = true speech_silent_override = false speech_window_has_focus = true speech_runtime_enabled = true focusnote = true
subst = subst or {} subst.status = subst.status or 1
-- ============================================================================ -- HELPERS -- ============================================================================
function FileExists(filename) local file = io.open(filename, "r") if file then file:close() return true end return false end
function split(str, pat) local t = {} local fpat = "(.-)" .. pat local last_end = 1 local s, e, cap = str:find(fpat, 1)
while s do if s ~= 1 or cap ~= "" then table.insert(t, cap) end last_end = e + 1 s, e, cap = str:find(fpat, last_end) end
if last_end <= #str then cap = str:sub(last_end) table.insert(t, cap) end
return t end
function restore_ftts() local saved = GetVariable("ftts_saved") if saved ~= nil then SetVariable("ftts", saved) DeleteVariable("ftts_saved") end end
function focus_silence_enabled() return GetVariable("ftts") == "1" end
function update_tts_state() if not speech_master_enabled then speech_runtime_enabled = false return end
if speech_silent_override then speech_runtime_enabled = false return end
if focus_silence_enabled() and not speech_window_has_focus then speech_runtime_enabled = false return end
speech_runtime_enabled = true end
function say(str) if not str or str == "" then return end nvda.say(str) end
function stop() nvda.stop() end
function normalize_for_speech(text) if not text then return nil end
text = text:gsub("^%s+", "") text = text:gsub("%s+$", "") return text end
function note_say(text) if not text or text == "" or not text:find("%S") then return end
text = normalize_for_speech(text) if not text or text == "" then return end
say(text) end
function interrupt_say(text) if not text or text == "" or not text:find("%S") then return end
text = normalize_for_speech(text) if not text or text == "" then return end
if jfwobject and nvda.jaws_running() then jfwobject:SayString(text, 1) else stop() say(text) end end
function process_substitution(line) if subst.status == 0 then return line end
local replacement = subst[line] if replacement == nil then return line end
if replacement == "!skip" then return nil end
return replacement end
function speak_output_line(line) if not speech_runtime_enabled then return end
if not line or line == "" or not line:find("%S") then return end
local spoken = process_substitution(line) if not spoken then return end
spoken = normalize_for_speech(spoken) if not spoken or spoken == "" or not spoken:find("%S") then return end
say(spoken) end
function tnote(what) note_say(what) end
-- ============================================================================ -- SUBSTITUTIONS -- ============================================================================
if GetVariable("ftts") == nil then SetVariable("ftts", "0") end
if FileExists(GetInfo(67) .. "/settings/substitutions.mushz") then dofile(GetInfo(67) .. "/settings/substitutions.mushz") end
function substfunc(n, l, w) local act = split(w[1], " ")
if act[1] == "on" then subst.status = 1 tnote("Substitutions on.")
elseif act[1] == "off" then subst.status = 0 tnote("Substitutions off.")
elseif act[1] == "remove" then w[1] = string.sub(w[1], 8)
if subst[w[1]] == nil then Note("No substitution found for the entered text.") else subst[w[1]] = nil Note("Substitution removed!") Execute("subst save") end
elseif act[1] == "add" then local wc = split(w[1], "==") wc[1] = string.sub(wc[1], 5)
if wc[2] == nil then Note("You must specify a substitution replacement by including 2 equal signs in your command (line==substitute).") return end
subst[wc[1]] = wc[2] tnote("OK, substitution added.") Execute("subst save")
elseif act[1] == "clear" then subst = {} subst.status = 1 tnote("Cleared!") Execute("subst save")
elseif act[1] == "list" then require "tprint" tprint(subst)
elseif act[1] == "save" then local vars = GetInfo(67) .. "/settings/substitutions.mushz" local exfw = assert(io.open(vars, "w")) local exfc = serialize.save_simple(subst) assert(exfw:write("subst=" .. exfc)) exfw:close() tnote("Saved!")
else tnote("Unrecognized substitutions command. Possible commands are: clear, list, add, remove, on, off") end end
-- ============================================================================ -- PLUGIN EVENTS -- ============================================================================
function OnPluginInstall() assert(package.loadlib("MushReader.dll", "luaopen_audio"))() restore_ftts() speech_window_has_focus = true speech_master_enabled = true speech_silent_override = false update_tts_state() stop() end
function OnPluginGetFocus() speech_window_has_focus = true update_tts_state() end
function OnPluginLoseFocus() speech_window_has_focus = false update_tts_state() end
function OnPluginScreendraw(t, log, line) speak_output_line(line) end
function OnPluginTabComplete(word) if speech_runtime_enabled and word and word ~= "" then interrupt_say(word) end end
-- ============================================================================ -- COMMANDS -- ============================================================================
function TTSToggle(name, line, wc) if speech_master_enabled then speech_master_enabled = false update_tts_state() stop() say("speech off") else speech_master_enabled = true restore_ftts() update_tts_state() stop() say("speech on") end end
function TTSFocusToggle() if GetVariable("ftts") == "0" then SetVariable("ftts", "1") Note("Speech will now be disabled when switching windows.") else SetVariable("ftts", "0") Note("Speech will no longer be disabled when switching windows.") end
update_tts_state() end
Accelerator("f8", "tts") Accelerator("ctrl+f8", "ftts")
